description: Hard trigger: No CGM data for > 60 minutes. Uses POST /test/check-data-gap (DEMO_MODE=true required)
prerequisite: DEMO_MODE=true; no CGM records for the user in the past 60 minutes; emergency contact with notify_on containing 'data_gap'
expected_outcome: HARD_TRIGGER → EmergencyService.fire → App push + SMS + Twilio call
